nasb.text: And looking at them Jesus said to them, “With people this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.”

esv.text: But Jesus looked at them and said, “With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.”

cnv.text: 耶穌看著他們說：“在人這是不能的，在　神卻凡事都能。”

ccb.text: 耶稣看着他们说：“对人而言，这不可能；但对上帝而言，凡事都可能。”

csbs.text: 耶稣注视着他们，说：“在人，这是不可能的；但是在神，凡事都可能。”
